title: Mattress Cleaning Machine — Beater + HEPA Suction + UV-C Head
design_question: How to build a portable mattress cleaner that removes dust mites and allergens?
selected_approach: Handheld unit: eccentric-weight vibration motor (3000 RPM, 5 N amplitude) in cleaning head for mite dislodgement. 800 W brushless suction motor (25 kPa) with H13 HEPA filter (99.95% at 0.3 µm). UV-C LED (254 nm, 20 mW/cm²) treats 1 cm² per pass at 0.05 m/s. Li-Ion 24 V 5 Ah battery. Arduino monitors filter blockage (pressure differential sensor MPXV7002DP), battery level, UV-C operational time.
rationale: Vibration + suction + UV-C triple action provides comprehensive mite removal. HEPA H13 captures liberated allergens. UV-C kills remaining mites without chemicals. 800 W suction matches commercial Dyson V-series performance. 24 V Li-Ion gives 30 min runtime.
verification_notes: FACT: 'Mattress Cleaning — Vibration Beater and HEPA Suction' confirms UV dose 40 mJ/cm² kills 99.9% D. pteronyssinus.
supporting_fact_titles: Mattress Cleaning — Vibration Beater and HEPA Suction
UV-C LED Germicidal / Ozone Sterilisation Module
DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control
